judge_result.short_rationale: The answer includes washing with water, but it omits required source-backed actions to apply sterile dressings if needed and to consult a skin specialist for any confirmed skin exposure. It also weakens escalation by saying to seek care only if irritation persists or large-area exposure. Added instructions about removing clothing, washing with soap, and avoiding neutralizing agents/ointments are not grounded in the provided truth, with the added do-not advice counting as unsupported dangerous content under the benchmark rules.
